title: HAL_VERDICT_V1
description: Structured audit verdict from the HAL (auditor/governor) layer. Enforces I-BLOCK: verdict=BLOCK iff required_fixes non-empty.

verdict.description: HAL's audit decision. BLOCK requires non-empty required_fixes (I-BLOCK invariant).

reasons.description: Human-readable reasons for the verdict. Always present.

required_fixes.description: Actions HER must take before resubmitting. Non-empty iff verdict=BLOCK.

oneOf.description: proposal_hash of the HEROutput that was audited.

HALCertificates.description: Binding hashes tying this HALVerdict to the session state.

her_block_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of canonicalized [HER] block text. T-TWO-4 binding. 'COMPUTE_ME' if LLM cannot compute.

policy_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of active policy canonical JSON. 'COMPUTE_ME' if not available.

identity_hash_hex.description: IdentityBindingV1.identity_hash for this session. 'COMPUTE_ME' if not available.

required_fixes: Remove 'I decide' — replace with proposal format.
